examples: Tetrodotoxin is the potent poison that can turn fugu into a final meal.
Eating fugu (e.g., tiger puffer fish) sushi in a fine Yokohama restaurant... golden.
Fugu is the only food officially illegal for the Emperor of Japan to eat -for his safety.
In the middle of the trip, my girlfriend's aunt took me to a fugu restaurant in Setagaya.
You put your life into a chef's hands all the time when it comes to food safety (or if you're like me and have food allergies) but nothing is as serious as eating fugu.
